name: Workspace Artifacts
description: Browse, preview, and edit OpenClaw workspace files from the authenticated Gateway.

rootPath.description: Optional workspace root override. Defaults to the configured OpenClaw workspace.

runtime.description: Dynamic (Node server) artifact runtime. The plugin proxies /plugins/workspace-artifacts/run/<id>/ to a single managed container.

enabled.description: Enable the dynamic-artifact runtime container. Defaults to true.

dockerBin.description: Docker (or compatible) CLI binary. Defaults to 'docker'.

image.description: Runtime image tag. Built from plugins/workspace-artifacts/runtime if absent. Defaults to 'openclaw-artifacts-runtime:0.1.0'.

hostPort.description: Loopback host port the supervisor (container :7000) is published to. Defaults to 7080.

egress.description: Allow outbound network so 'npm ci' can fetch deps. Set false for an offline (server.js-only) posture. Defaults to true.
